text.title: Kanban and SAFe Ceremonies Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the Kanban and SAFe Ceremonies methodology end-to-end.

step.name: pick-ceremony-set
step.action: Pick one of {kanban-lightweight, kanban-cadenced, safe-essential, safe-full}.

step.name: define-stages-wip
step.decision-gate: If any stage lacks WIP limit, halt.

step.name: lock-cadence
step.action: Lock replenishment + flow review + (for SAFe) PI planning windows.

step.name: publish-flow-metrics
step.action: Wire up lead-time, cycle-time, throughput, WIP measurement.

step.name: walk-and-iterate
step.action: Run cadence; review metrics every cycle; adjust WIP limits gradually.
